comments.body:
Polyresearch claim: thesis #1 by node `worker-a`.

<!-- polyresearch:claim
thesis: 1
node: worker-a
-->

Polyresearch attempt: thesis #1, branch `thesis/1-first`, metric `17658.0000`, observation `improved`.

<!-- polyresearch:attempt
thesis: 1
branch: thesis/1-first
metric: 17658
baseline_metric: 15000
observation: improved
summary: valid first attempt
-->

Polyresearch release: thesis #1 by node `worker-a` (`reason: no_improvement`).

<!-- polyresearch:release
thesis: 1
node: worker-a
reason: no_improvement
-->

Polyresearch claim: thesis #1 by node `worker-b`.

<!-- polyresearch:claim
thesis: 1
node: worker-b
-->

Polyresearch attempt: thesis #1, branch `thesis/1-poisoned`, metric `218000.0000`, observation `improved`.

<!-- polyresearch:attempt
thesis: 1
branch: thesis/1-poisoned
metric: 218000
baseline_metric: 15000
observation: improved
summary: anomalous invalid attempt
-->

Polyresearch admin repair: Acknowledge anomalous attempt from node without valid canonical claim.

<!-- polyresearch:admin-note
action: acknowledge_invalid
target: issue #1
note: Acknowledge anomalous attempt from node without valid canonical claim.
related_comment_id: 105
-->
